bug.actual_behavior: The default urllib collector received HTTP 403 Cloudflare 1010 Access denied on all endpoints until a browser-like User-Agent and related headers were added.
evidence: HTTP 403 Cloudflare error 1010: site owner has blocked access based on browser signature.
bug.expected_behavior: The read-only collector should be robust against common edge-layer bot signature checks when querying an authorized sub2api site.
bug.impact: 这是由 skill 设计缺陷导致的真实环境问题，需要纳入后续修复闭环。
reproduction_steps: Use an authorized sub2api site protected by Cloudflare browser-signature rules.
Run collect_sub2api_data.py with valid SUB2API_BASE_URL and SUB2API_ADMIN_API_KEY.
bug.summary: collector lacks browser-like User-Agent and can be blocked by Cloudflare 1010
bug.workaround: Use browser-like Accept/User-Agent/Origin/Referer headers for read-only collection.
